commands.review_summary:
The branch changes `reparseProgramFromActionArgs` to climb to the root Commander program for raw argv and root `parseAsync`, with nested lazy-command regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +25. Total +37 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main reparses nested lazy commands from the subcommand while Commander clears intermediate `rawArgs`, and the PR body includes terminal-style proof of the non-zero exit after the patch; I did not execute a local repro because this review is read-only.
